content:
The Amazon Judgment and expansion of the proportionality principle

The Supreme Court’s Amazon judgment expands the doctrine of proportionality into regulatory decision-making, especially under the Competition Act, requiring regulators to act predictably, fairly, and proportionately. 

The Author: Ajit Warrier is a Partner at Shardul Amarchand Mangaldas & Co. 

Read the Viewpoint: https://lnkd.in/dpt_gvDs
